description:
We can provide you with the skills, experience  and knowledge you need to skyrocket through the ranks of the IT industry faster than anyone even if you have zero experience right now.  

Our job-ready training program (which is based on our thorough experience working at Cisco, Dimension Data, Arista, etc. and as IT instructors for the  U.S. Air Force) and and in-person certification will help you master the most in-demand networking skills in 2-5 months so that you can break into a tech job or get promoted. 

Additionally, we provide 1:1 live mentorship from some of the best engineers in the world, skills assessment, career guidance and a proven system that can help you prioritize and execute your career plans confidently.  

Apply to our program here: http://zerotoengineer.com
and/or

name: ActivityHero
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to find online workshops, summer camps, and after-school classes for kids. The company's marketplace helps to compare schedules from different providers, read reviews from other families, and register online to streamline operations and get additional bookings to shop for camps and kids' nights out, enabling parents to book with one registration form, and read parent reviews and coordinate with friends.

name: AmazingTalker
description: Developer of a robust online learning platform designed to empower learners in their pursuit of any language or subject. The company's services include learning with one-on-one attention and guidance, taking customized courses that fit individual schedule, budget and interests and an immersive language learning environment, enabling learners to take online tutoring from professional online language tutors and teachers.

name: AOne
description: B2B Backend Management SaaS and payment software for educational businesses in Southeast Asia

name: ApplyBoard
description: Provider of online education services intended to empower students around the world to access education. The company's platform automates and streamlines the educational application process by connecting students and recruitment agencies with post-secondary institutions, enabling students from all around the world to apply to universities in North America without any hassles.

name: Aprende
description: Developer of an online education platform designed to offer vocational skills training. The company's platform offers a wide range of online training courses and diploma that assists students in acquiring skills needed to start their own business or a new career in areas of high demand, enabling students to earn extra income through small self-owned businesses.

name: Principly
description: Developer of an investment platform designed to guide college students to save money. The company's platform offers a simple, fast, and efficient way to create a college savings plan provides a link for family and friends to contribute easily, and allows for tax-free investment of savings, enabling parents and families to save smartly for their children's education and future.

name: Briko
description: Operator of a digital educational platform intended to offer robotics and programming language lessons for children. The company's platform provides online training courses to coach students on robotics programming and projects using practical engineering workshops and a robotics designing toolkit, enabling children and young people to learn programming in an easy and fun way.

name: Brilliant
description: Operator of an educational platform intended to aid students in mastering mathematics and physics. The company's platform connects students, educators, professionals, olympiad champions, and enthusiasts from around the world, enabling students to master the concepts of math, science, and engineering by solving challenging problems.

name: Calificadas
description: An AI-powered communication coach for women.

name: Carelulu
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to ensure every child has access to safe, affordable, high-quality child care and early education. The company's marketplace connects parents to licensed daycares and preschools and offers a criteria-based search and detailed information on childcare providers such as cost, hours, photos, and verified reviews, enabling parents to find safe and affordable childcare and early education for their kids.

name: Clanbeat
description: Developer of a talent development platform designed to facilitate students and adults in driving their own learning and being well-balanced human beings along that journey. The company's platform helps students build positive learning habits with regular reflection nudges, work planner, and goal-setting features and allow teachers to collect on students' mood and well-being from actionable insights and data, empowering students and teachers everywhere to take the lead in their life and learning.

name: CLAP
description: Developer of management software designed for the onboarding process. The company's software is an integrated growth platform that connects employee goals, feedback, and performance and allows goal alignment, enabling firms to optimize their performance management culture, and providing communication and leadership guides for effective performance management.

name: Classera
description: Developer of ed-tech platform and education management system intended on providing every student, teacher, or employee with the tools needed for their development regardless of their age. The company specializes in K-12 learning management systems and provides features such as a student information system, student attendance system, social learning, grade book, and transcript management system enabling users to track their records and learn at their own pace.

name: Comento
description: Operator of recruiting platform intended to connect job hunters with employment opportunities. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence algorithms to create training boot camp programs and talent referral matching services along with peer-to-peer counseling, enabling job seekers to find the right job.

name: Cometa
description: Developer of a financial payments platform designed for the education sector for the consequences of a system depleted of technological tools. The company features include flexible, fast, and simple payments with different methods such as credit or debit card, cash, or wire transfer, enabling school administration to automate their operational processes and save valuable time.

name: Descomplica
description: Operator of an e-learning platform intended to prepare for college entrance exams. The company's platform offers free access to pre-recorded classes, live classes, online monitoring as well as online lessons for subjects like mathematics, physics, and chemistry to help people achieve their goals through affordable and quality education, enabling students to learn at their own pace as well as prepare and clear other entrance exams at low cost.

name: Dyad
description: Provider of an educational consulting platform designed to provide mentorship for talented and determined individuals. The company's educational consulting platform offers assistance and consulting services to international students during their university admission processes and helps them to take their decision wisely, enabling users to get motivated and develop the skills and network needed to launch an international career.

name: EduAdvisor
description: Operator of an online education platform intended to help students compare colleges and courses. The company provides comprehensive information and comparison tools, translates education jargon into relevant content, provides recommendations and counseling and helps to compare courses, enabling students to make informed decisions about their college selection and obtain the right college education.

name: Edukita
description: Operator of an educational platform intended to deliver an effective and affordable English teaching experience. The company's platform aims to deliver a program that is effective in building fluency in an affordable way and offers live classes delivered by native speakers in an internationally benchmarked curriculum, enabling students to learn English in a way that is both effective and enjoyable.

name: Elevate
description: Developer of cognitive training tool designed to build communication and analytical skills. The company's tool offers flexible training, unlimited access, and performance tracking all through games to improve critical skills, enabling users to boost productivity and earn skills and self-confidence.

name: Englease FZ LLC
description: Provider of an online educational platform intended to prepare for English proficiency tests. The company's platform offers one-to-one sessions that assist users in tracking their progress, consolidating their learning and making time to assess their future learning needs, and providing online courses for preparing for exams like IELTS and TOEFL, enabling users in the MENA region to improve their fluency in English.

name: Enuma, Inc.
description: Developer of a game-based learning application designed to support and empower children to be independent learners. The company's application offers practice and support for preschool through second-grade math skills and a flexible learning architecture that includes a suite of mini-games, books, videos, and quizzes along with a free-reign library, enabling children to gain confidence and independence while building foundational skills.

name: Evolve
description: AI-based course builder that transforms content into engaging trainings, reducing onboarding time by 40% and training costs by up to 50%.

name: Get
description: Operator of a financial platform intended to assist teens in saving and using money wisely. The company's platform helps users manage money while learning financial literacy and independence at an earlier age, even shop with their personalized card and get spending notifications via mobile application, enabling users to easily send and receive money with family and friends instantly.

name: Gnowbe
description: Developer of a mobile micro-learning educational software designed to offer employee development, training, and engagement tool. The company's system features group boards for shared learning and, scheduled session deployment, rapid curation accessing multimedia options, gamification, offline access, and push notifications, enabling creators to improve culture, and capabilities by designing engaging, informative, fun content.

name: GoPillar
description: Operator of a designer community platform intended to provide an architectural marketplace. The company's platform helps people to find professionals they can rely on to support renovation or construction projects as well as provide a single 3D render or virtual tour and designs a whole construction project from the ground up, enabling clients to access and connect with designers to make their designs come true.

name: iDialogue
description: Developer of an online learning platform intended to connect students with teachers and peers from around the world. The company's platform provides micro-tutoring and tools for self-paced learning combined with on-demand interactive learning activities, such as virtual field trips and workshops with experts, guest speakers and professionals from different areas, enabling students to receive an immersive learning experience.

name: Izif
description: Developer of music learning platform designed to offer music lessons. The company's platform teaches people how to play different musical instruments through online high-definition video tutorials, enabling people to play musical instruments on their own.

name: CoTeach
description: Developer of an ed-tech platform designed to empower teachers with the next generation of innovative tools. The company's platform provides a personalized question bank that allows one to store and search for assessment questions feasibly, enabling teachers to create assessments from scratch by simply taking a photo, uploading a photo, or even a PDF to digitize questions in seconds.

name: Jumpcut
description: Developer of an educational platform designed to provide assistance to aspiring entrepreneurs. The company's platform provides educational content videos in the form of movies and online education courses on social media, enabling users to improve their skills to turn their passions into successful businesses.

name: Kibin
description: Provider of online proofreading and editing services intended to empower students to become a writer. The company's services streamline the revision process and inspire new ideas and fresh approaches to writing problems as well as provide feedback to students so they can improve their grades and writing skills, enabling students and organizations to elevate their essays with a suite of services and free resources.

name: Kiko Labs
description: Developer of neuroscience-based adaptive games designed to target the skills for school success. The company's application is designed to challenge cognitive learning skills such as memory, focus, and reasoning which are necessary groundwork for learning in kindergarten and beyond, helping children develop their minds.

name: Kings
description: Operator of an online learning platform intended to improve students' academic skills. The company provides an online diagnostic test to analyze student performance and provide information about their academic abilities as well as collaboration tools to allow students to work together on projects and assignments, enabling students to learn at their own pace with the opportunity to interact with other students and instructors to get feedback on their work.

name: KiwiCo
description: Producer of hands-on activity materials intended to help create problem-solving skills. The company delivers projects encompassing subjects like science, technology, engineering, art, and math, enabling parents to encourage their kid's natural creativity and curiosity and develop creative confidence.

name: Kodable
description: Developer of programming curriculum software intended to make programming education accessible to children. The company's platform translates computer science into easy-to-teach lessons and games that kids love and offers scripted lesson plans, and automated assessment tools among others, enabling teachers and parents to teach computer science to tomorrow's innovators and explore the universe of coding problems, solving math, and language arts.

name: Polyup
description: Developer of an online learning platform designed to empower kids to mod metaverse with a basic knowledge of mathematics. The company's platform primarily helps children to understand mathematical concepts using data science helping them to learn while playing, without teachers needing to micromanage their students, enabling users to learn mathematics interactively.

name: Linguatrip
description: Developer of an online platform designed to offer foreign language learning from anywhere in the world. The company's platform connects learners to language immersions abroad and offers students booking and accommodation facilities, enabling students to find suitable courses from a wide selection of accredited schools at discounted rates.

name: Liveboard
description: Developer of a tutoring platform designed to teach and manage tutoring businesses online. The company's platform offer feature such as recordings, whiteboards, teaching materials, interactive quizzes, video calls, students' contacts, and more, thereby enabling remote tutors to teach online and manage daily routines.

name: Lala
description: Lala helps music teachers worldwide to host lessons online.

name: Melodics
description: Developer of a desktop application designed to help people to play their musical instruments with confidence. The company's application offers music lessons that build a rhythm, timing, and muscle memory to develop an understanding of the patterns, theory, and structure of contemporary music through active learning and performance, enabling music enthusiasts to improve musical skills by making practice fun, relevant, and effective.

name: Presence
description: Developer of student engagement and learning software designed to assist in the management and assessment process. The company's software helps universities to improve retention rates by tracking and learning about their students' involvement patterns and behaviors and makes it easy to visualize and assess efforts through data, streamlines workflows for departments and student organizations, enabling universities to map and create learning outcomes to opportunities for student success.

name: Monkibox
description: Provider of learning subscription services intended to support baby's cognitive and motor development with toys. The company provides educational toys every two months that contain unique and specifically tailored toys for a specified age group of babies, helping parents turn playtime into a learning experience for their children.

name: Mujer Financiera
description: Developer of a financial social network platform designed to close the gender gap in financial inclusion for women through education and community. The company's platform helps women develop their financial skills so that they can make the best financial decisions for themselves and their families' well-being with the help of a data profiling model which identifies the right content for each woman to directly impact finances, enabling women to be better equipped to connect with banks and fintech to acquire financial services according to their needs.

name: Myu
description: Developer of a communication platform designed to facilitate proper communication with the school community. The company's application lets users communicate with their students by sending announcements and notifications to any mobile at any time along with attaching photos and voice notifications, enabling teachers to connect with the community without the need of sharing a phone number.

name: Nanno
description: Developer of an online on-demand application designed to find and book a babysitter. The company's platform allows to browse, shortlist, book, and pay babysitters as well as performs background checking of every sitter listed on the platform, enabling parents to book vetted sitters from their phone or computer and keep their children safe at home.

name: Nas Academy
description: Operator of a production studio intended to create impactful stories for social media. The company's site shares a list of trending blogs, one-minute videos, journals, and articles on life, culture, travel, and food and also offers a content creation platform, providing viewers with various stories from the world and empowering creators to become educators.

name: Noon Academy
description: Developer of an e-learning platform designed to prepare students for their examinations digitally. The company's platform offers tutoring and educational content through a subscription model that allows all users free access to basic content and charges them for access to private tutors and more advanced content, enabling students to practice important study material while also allowing learning in a group with friends efficiently.

name: NoRedInk
description: Developer of a web-based learning platform designed to improve the grammar and writing skills of young students. The company's platform generates a set of questions based on topics from sports teams to TV shows to pop icons, identifies grammatical and other errors in the answers provides appropriate tutorials and follow-up exercises, and offers teachers a detailed breakdown of each student's strengths and weaknesses, enabling fresh talents to improve their writing skills in a way that's engaging and authentic as compared to the traditional method of relying solely on study materials.

name: OpenDurian
description: Operator of an online learning platform designed to cover a wide spectrum of educational tests. The company's platform provides free and premium online test-preparation materials written by expert instructors and covers courses that are relevant from school-college admissions and language proficiency to professional certification exams, providing students a high-quality production of online courses with a medium to encounter problems through reading books and failing exams.

name: Open Presence
description: Developer of student engagement and learning software designed to assist in the management and assessment process. The company's software helps universities to improve retention rates by tracking and learning about their students' involvement patterns and behaviors and makes it easy to visualize and assess efforts through data, streamlines workflows for departments and student organizations, enabling universities to map and create learning outcomes to opportunities for student success.

name: Pandai
description: Developer of a learning application designed for students to get better grades in school. The company's application provides gamified quizzes aligned to a specific school curriculum, practice questions, and learning materials, enabling students to learn, practice, get feedback, and diagnose weaknesses through a fun and engaging learning experience.

name: Platzi
description: Provider of online professional education services intended to teach in-demand skills. The company's services include live-streaming classes through its platform on inspiring design, marketing, business, and programming courses from professionals with real-time collaboration among pupils and industry leaders as teachers, enabling students to stay up-to-date with the current market needs.

name: Playbook
description: Developer of education platform designed to bridge the global gender gap and get more women into leadership roles. The company specializes in providing edutainment packages and diverse digital masterclasses led by women leaders, enabling women to get unstuck in their personal and professional lives and navigate pain points with much more clarity and perspective as they learn from real-world scenarios and tactics.

name: Playcurio
description: Developer of a learning platform designed to make learning fun through the combination of real teaching aids and digital contents. The company's platform offers augmented reality and virtual reality content with accessibility to tablets, pc, mobile, television and 3D animation and presents joy to children with quality digital contents, enabling children to learn while playing.

name: Praktika.ai Company
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence platform designed to help people improve spoken English skills. The company's platform helps to prepare for a job interview in English, provides a robot that will role-play an interview and also maintain the dialogues as real interviews, provides a personal score and improvement tips, helps to improve speaking and listening skills, and enhances writing skills during chat interactions, enabling learners to receive AI language feedback and get AI-generated hints to improve language skills.

name: Salduu (Profe Social)
description: Operator of an education network platform designed to enrich teachers' educational experience through collaboration with other teachers. The company's platform allows sharing of educational resources and experiences that can serve as inspiration for other teachers, and at the same time receive feedback, enabling teachers from all over the world to grow professionally together and earn money.

name: Quero Educação
description: Developer of an education platform designed to connect students with educational institutions. The company offers a marketplace for finding scholarships and courses, a digital enrollment platform, a payment processing system, marketing and recruitment tools, data analytics and financial services, enabling students to find and enroll in higher education.

name: Saturday Kids
description: Operator of digital literacy classes intended to transform kids into self-motivated learners who are curious, inventive, and resourceful. The company provides a wide range of coding classes for kids and different curricula for different ages, enabling students to learn coding.

name: Spare Payments
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to help schools implement cashless payments. The company offers a wearable device paired with financial software on smartphones that allow kids to make purchases at school through electronic payments, enabling parents to leverage modern technology to create a safer life for their children.

name: Springboard
description: Developer of an educational platform designed to make quality education accessible to everyone. The company's workforce upskilling platform offers online courses with one-to-one mentorship and job placement support, enabling people to break into in-demand tech careers in data science, UX design, and software engineering.

name: Likeplum
description: Developer of an online education platform designed to help students with their homework. The company's platform helps solve questions of the students by connecting them with tutors who can provide quick explanations to their queries, enabling students to keep the learning process going without getting frustrated and losing their passion for academic subjects.

name: StudySoup
description: Developer of a peer-to-peer learning platform intended to share knowledge and study materials. The company's learning platform helps to sell and purchase class notes and study guides, enabling students to get relevant study content on their path to higher education.

name: Talently
description: Developer of an educational platform intended to accelerate the professional development of Latin American technical talents. The company's platform offers training for English language and technical issues, job and interview information, skills assessment, and mock interviews, enabling customers to get suitable jobs in software development, anywhere in the world.

name: Talk Labs
description: Talk Labs is a platform that helps companies train customer-facing and frontline employees through realistic AI voice trainers: businesses can either use ready-to-deploy coaches or upload their own scripts, service standards, sales methodologies, rare edge cases, and internal materials, which the system then turns into interactive voice simulations where employees speak with AI as if they were talking to a real customer, guest, or buyer, practice in a safe environment, and receive instant personalized feedback on mistakes, argumentation, tone, and service quality, while managers and L&D teams get analytics on skills, gaps, progress, training quality, and its impact on the business; Talk Labs replaces one-off training sessions and poorly scalable manual practice with an always-available, highly scalable, measurable, and quickly adaptable AI infrastructure for improving sales and service in industries such as hospitality, retail, banking, and telecom.

name: Tarefa
description: Operator of a digital educational platform designed to help students to improve their learning skills. The company's platform offers courses on a subscription basis, connects students with professional teachers in order to teach, solve and provide answers to users' math exercises, enabling students to post their difficult queries to be solved online in an efficient manner.

name: TEDI
description: Operator of an online educational platform aimed at developing and improving student's education. The company's platform provides a variety of services and educational programs that prioritize developing critical-analytical knowledge to be able to apply it in real projects, are available and recorded that can be viewed around the clock, have flexible study hours, providing the students, to grow professional their path together with teachers with great experience in the world of construction and as well as course completion certificates.

name: Think Parametric
description: Developer of online education platform designed for the architectural, engineering, and construction industry. The company helps students and professionals learn the latest technologies and implement them in the execution of their projects to create better buildings, enabling users to learn a new way of thinking and approaching design and how to implement new skills.

name: Vonder
description: Developer of an online learning platform designed to provide microlearning via chatbots. The company's platform offers a cloud-based learning management system to deliver effective and engaging online training, enabling organizations to support corporate learning and talent development and schools to provide efficient learning to students.

name: Wited (Portal Educativo)
description: Developer of an online educational network designed to deliver quality, engaging, and accessible education to students. The company's platform offers online interactive courses for kids from elementary through high school, enabling individual students to receive personalized educational assistance and thus improve their performance.

name: Six Deg
description: Developer of a social learning platform designed to promote and improve peer learning outcomes for students. The company's platform forms a social layer on top of existing enterprise learning systems to build engaging learning experiences privately and securely and helps to turn their classroom into a collaborative learning community, enabling institutions and universities to increase students' knowledge of current affairs and increase engagement and retention.

name: Zoog.A.I.
description: Developer of a visual communication platform designed to interact in a fresh and fun way. The company's platform offers an asynchronous communication experience to bring books to life using built-in AR masks, filters, sound effects, and animations, enabling people to create meaningful family moments.

name: Quipper
description: Developer of an online education platform intended to assist students to learn anytime, anywhere, at their own pace. The company's online education platform provides an e-learning resource in a quiz format which allows users to create their own quizzes via a content-distribution process and engages various users worldwide, enabling users to learn in a fun way.

name: Epic!
description: Provider of an online book subscription service intended to offer unlimited access to over 20,000 high-quality books. The company's online book subscription service include curated of read-to-me, audio books and educational videos, enabling children aged 12 and under to instantly discover contents of their interest, read them and share with friends.

name: OpenAir Publishing
description: Provider of platform that publishes digital books for iPads and iPhone.The company designs e-books which readers can touch, watch, listen and read.

name: Chalkable
description: Developer of administration software. The company is engaged in the development of automated means of accountability to integrate the curriculum and mission standards of private schools and non-profit organizations.

name: Admittedly
description: Provider of an online college advisory platform. The company's online college advisory platform uses individual student academic performance and psychometric data, enabling high school students to find and gather information about schools and colleges before applying for admission.

name: Ostaz
description: Developer of a mobile-based tutoring platform intended to connect students seeking help in a specific course to private tutors. The company's tutoring platform connects students to tutors based on their preferences such as location, rating, availability, and other related factors, enabling students to enhance their academic performance.

name: Ubooly
description: Provider of iPhone and iPad games for children. The company offers an iOS application and plush toy with voice recognition capabilities that allow children to play educational and interactive games.

name: Motion Math
description: Developer of engaging educational games designed to help children find delight in intellectual challenge. The company's games use an innovative learning model that playfully teaches the conceptual foundations of math with interactive visuals and provides access to over 900 levels of adaptive content on the web or via iPad applications, enabling students to master the most challenging K-6 standards.

name: TeachStreet
description: Provider of an online community website. The company connects teachers, schools and students together. It enables learners to find classes by subject or teacher, as well as provides a public forum that helps teachers, coaches and experts to share what they know.

name: StudyEdge
description: Provider of college tutorial services. The company develops an online platform that offers course specific video tutorial services to college students.

name: Chromatik
description: Provider of digital music learning platform designed to help users to play along with sheet music. The company's Chromatik platform offers its users to practice, perform and learn music while they can also upload and download music from website, enabling users to play music and access reference tracks, annotation tools and recording features.

name: Piper Inc.
description: Developer of a computer kit designed to let children assemble their own computers. The company's computer kit is pre-installed with 10 worlds that interact with the computer kit while being built, utilizing in-game directions for how to add on to the hardware and sensors in order to advance in the game, enabling kids to create with code and electronics and learn the basics of technology through tangible play.

name: Mision Admision
description: Developer of an online educational platform. The company offers university and college entrance examination preparation courses to students online.

name: Clutch Learning
description: Provider of a video-tutoring platform. The company's platform offers textbook-specific video courses for college students that helps in learning their curriculum topics.

name: Intap Labs
description: Provider of a cloud-based platform intended to offer language and culture learning services. The company's platform offers an application software which hosts intuitive audio-visual language, lessons and practice widgets in different languages, enabling learners to build their English vocabulary and in other languages.

name: EcoMom
description: Operator of an online shopping portal that recommends and sells eco-conscious products for children. The company offers baby care, holiday, bath and body, feeding and nursing, and health and wellness products, as well as organic baby food, toys, books, clothing and gifts.

name: Rebel Girls
description: Developer of interactive digital content platform designed to offer games and study materials for children. The company's platform develops an educational application that helps children to play games, read news and view pictures online, enabling users to make their children learn, grow and have fun at the same time.

name: uNow
description: Provider of an online education platform designed to ensure that a quality higher education is available to people everywhere. The company's educational platform provides peer-to-peer learning communities, pedagogical models and tuition models and also operates a network of online schools that provides higher education programs, enabling people to get a proper degree, who might not otherwise get a college degree, due to cost or other commitments.

name: Mahmee
description: Provider of a prenatal and postpartum care management platform designed to deliver personalized, ongoing education and live support to new families everywhere. The company's care management platform is a collaboration between maternity, infant care practitioners and large health systems to connect and integrate care across a highly fragmented maternal care system comprised of hospitals, insurers, health systems and private practices, enabling patients to reduce hospital re admissions and increases breastfeeding rates.

name: Remind
description: Provider of a real-time messaging application designed to bridge the communication gap in primary education. The company's real-time messaging application schedules reminders ahead of time, as well as coordinates the logistics of school-related activities, enabling teachers, parents, students and administrators in K-12 schools to communicate with each other.

name: Tynker
description: Provider of a creative computer programming platform designed to teach children the art of coding. The company's creative computer programming platform teaches skills like developing animations, mobile games, creating music, crafting e-books and building fictional robots, enabling children to build application and games, mod Minecraft, control robots, and even learn JavaScript and Python at the age of 7.
